alternative_name_server_config.description: Specifies the configuration for alternative name servers to forward DNS queries, including target name servers and forwarding rules.

description.description: Defines the user-provided description for the DNS policy, offering context or purpose for the policy.

enable_inbound_forwarding.description: Determines whether DNS queries from VMs in the same VPC network are forwarded to the DNS resolvers specified in the policy.

enable_logging.description: Determines whether query logging is enabled for the DNS policy; must be true or false.

name.description: The name of the DNS policy, must be unique within the project and adhere to Google's naming conventions.

networks.description: Specifies the VPC networks to which the DNS policy is applied; must be in the same project as the policy.

timeouts.description: Defines timeout duration for operations related to the DNS policy, ensuring proper management of execution time.
